title: Trial Vault Reloader
description: Change the item used to reset vaults in Buuz135's Repeatable Trial Vaults
body:
This datapack allows you to configure buuz135's Repeatable Trial Vaults. RTV includes an item tag can_reset_trial_vaults. Items with this tag can remove a player from the list of players who have opened a vault, therefore permitting them to open it again. By default, the mod lists Trial Keys and Ominous Trial Keys under the tag, and there is no way to configure them.

Trial Vault Reloader changes the default item to Diamond (meaning to reopen a vault, a player must first click it with a diamond and then with the appropriate key).

Original Mod (required): [https://modrinth.com/mod/repeatable-trial-vaults](https://modrinth.com/mod/repeatable-trial-vaults)

**INSTRUCTIONS FOR CONFIGURATION** (reference images in the Gallery)
- To change, add, or remove items: first unzip the datapack, navigate to data/repatable_trial_vaults/tags/item and open the file can_reset_trial_vaults.json with a text editor.
- If you only want to replace the item, simply delete "minecraft:diamond" and replace it with the item ID of the item you want to use.
- If you want to add multiple items to the list, add a comma after the last set of quotation marks, then follow it with a space and then the item ID of the new item. Repeat this as many times as you need.
